rationale.fidelity: Correctly maps selection, latent violation status, later review finding, binding capacity, mechanism, and expected-harm objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Actor, shift trigger, feasible choices, stakes, scarce-capacity trade-off, counterfactual, and operational implications are all concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed; no novelty assertion is introduced.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels calibration as an assumption, rejects perfect violation knowledge, and states important model boundaries.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well structured and precise, with minor encoding artifacts and more detail than necessary.
rationale.overall: An exceptionally complete, implementable framing that preserves uncertainty and the review-capacity constraint.
